domain: Khmer Pradal Serey (Cambodian Kun Khmer 8-limb boxing; 4 strike types × 2 sides = 8 limbs; clinch phase for short-range elbow/knee; hip-rotation kicks; elbow-strike specialization gives most wins; codified early 20th century; derived from Bokator close-quarter combat)
specific_mechanism: PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM: 8-attack-type coevolutionary LLM red-team with standoff-vs-clinch-range + elbow-specialization weight. (1) Define 8 distinct attack-type families: prompt-injection, jailbreak, goal-hijack, tool-misuse, memory-poison, inter-agent-spoof, multi-turn-crescendo, role-play. (2) Two-phase combat: standoff (initial single-turn probes) vs clinch-range (multi-turn close-range crescendo). (3) Defender LLM trains simultaneously against all 8 with weighting α_i per family. (4) Strike-defense generation-wise coevolution: each cycle augments attack family with new variants from prior winning attacks; defender re-adapts. (5) Elbow-specialization: weight α_i tilted toward most-effective family (typically multi-turn-crescendo) — analogue of elbow-strike dominance. (6) Differs from R484 TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR by 8-family explicit + standoff/clinch + elbow-tilt; differs from RedTWIZ adaptive (no explicit 8-family + no clinch-phase distinction).
llm_application: PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM 8-family multi-strategy red-team + standoff/clinch-range phasing + strike-defense coevol + elbow-specialization weight. Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD. R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH. R433. R437 BERBER-AMAZIGH. R459 KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT. R473 SUMO-TACHI-AI. R484 TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR (different — lightweight rapid-cycle). Differs from Galileo 8 Red Teaming Strategies (closest — same 8 strategies but no phasing + no elbow-tilt). RedTWIZ adaptive. DeepTeam multi-turn + roleplay. LLM Red-Teaming Survey. Differs by EXPLICIT 8-FAMILY + STANDOFF-CLINCH-PHASE + ELBOW-SPECIALIZATION WEIGHT.
novelty_claim: Galileo 8 Strategies + RedTWIZ + DeepTeam + LLM Red-Team Survey cover multi-strategy adversarial paradigm. PRADAL-8-LIMB-RED-TEAM adds (a) explicit 8-family list + (b) standoff/clinch phase distinction + (c) elbow-specialization weight. Recombination — borderline lookup.
